description:
/////////////////////////////////////

Awesome and fun Game! Avoid the hot lava below. Avoid enemy contact. Shoot Enemy to progress to the next, random world. ///////////////////////////////////// =====[ Keys ]=====

[Arrow] keys = Move around. [OK] key = Pause / Resume [Toolbox] key ( The key below the [OK] key ) = Shoot Laser [Backspace] key ( The key below the [Back] key ) = Jump / Float ********************

Sincerely,

Wilson
